headline: Prudential Public H2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Prudential Public (NYSE:PUK) management used its full-year 2025 earnings presentation to emphasize what CEO Anil Wadhwani called a year of “high quality, consistent growth,” highlighting double-digit gains across key financial metrics, progress in a multi-year transformation program, and an expanded
